description_long: This is a small bird perched on a short, thick branch, with a compact body and a slightly hunched posture. Its plumage is predominantly dark gray to black with lighter gray and white spots and streaks along the wings and flanks. The head is rounded with a short, chisel-shaped beak, and there is a subtle reddish patch near the crown. The legs and feet are slender and appear dark, gripping the branch securely. The tail is relatively short and tapers to a subtle point, blending with the overall streamlined shape. The bird's surface texture appears matte and slightly rough, with visible feather details and naturalistic coloration.
description: A small, dark gray bird with white spots and a short, chisel-shaped beak, perched on a branch. It has a compact body, subtle reddish crown patch, and a slightly pointed tail.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the bird's rounded head, beak, and chest, with the branch visible beneath its feet.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the bird's streamlined body, wing pattern, and the full length of the tail and branch.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view displaying the back, tail, and both wings, with the reddish crown patch more visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bird's head, beak, and the branch, with the tail and wing pattern visible.
attribute_plumage_pattern: spotted and streaked with white patches on wings and flanks, dark back, and a reddish crown patch
